title: SDD Workflow Streamline
description: Streamline the SDD workflow across two work streams: (1) Comment CRUD extraction into sl comment CLI, (2) Bash script replacement with Go CLI commands. Includes 16 user stories for workflow consolidation.

title: Phase: Setup - Project Structure
description: WHY: Establish Go package structure and base configuration for new CLI commands.
design: Create pkg/cli/comment/, pkg/cli/spec/, pkg/cli/context/ directories. Add base types files per data-model.md.

title: Phase: Foundational - Shared Infrastructure
description: WHY: Core utilities and types needed by ALL user story implementations. Must complete before any user story work begins.
design: Port common.sh logic into Go packages. Enhance ContextDetector with fallback chain. Create shared PostgREST client base.

title: Phase: US16 - Bash Script Audit and CLI Replacement
description: WHY: Critical path for cross-platform support. AI commands currently call bash scripts as first step. Must create sl spec info/create/setup-plan and sl context update commands.
design: Create pkg/cli/spec/ and pkg/cli/context/ packages. Implement sl spec info, sl spec create, sl spec setup-plan, sl context update per contracts/sl-spec-cli.md.

title: Phase: US11 - Review Comment Management via sl comment
description: WHY: Without sl comment, agents cannot resolve comments with meaningful replies. Blocks clarify command from absorbing revise functionality.
design: Create pkg/cli/comment/ package with types.go, client.go. Implement sl comment CLI with list/show/reply/resolve subcommands per contracts/sl-comment-cli.md.

title: Phase: US1 - Inventory and Classify Workflow Components
description: WHY: Cannot streamline without understanding current state. The 4-layer model and CLI constitution provide the framework for all consolidation decisions.
design: Audit all skills, commands, CLI commands. Document layer assignments (Hook/CLI/Command/Skill) and pattern classifications (Data CRUD, Launcher, etc.). Draft CLI constitution.

title: Phase: US6 - Spike for Exploratory Research
description: WHY: Spikes are essential for reducing implementation risk by validating approaches early.
design: Create spike AI command template in .opencode/commands/. Output: specledger/[spec]/research/yyyy-mm-dd-[name].md. Follow research/spike-template.md structure.

title: Phase: US7 - Checkpoint Implementation Progress
description: WHY: Checkpoints provide safety and visibility into implementation progress. Session logs solve the implementation tracking gap.
design: Create checkpoint AI command in .opencode/commands/. Output: specledger/[spec]/sessions/yyyy-mm-dd-[name].md with spec compliance, changed files, deviations, session log.

title: Phase: US2 - Consolidate Dependency Commands
description: WHY: Dependency management has the most obvious overlap and user confusion.
design: Agent calls sl deps CLI directly. sl deps graph provides visualization. Update sl-deps skill to reference new graph subcommand.

title: Phase: US3 - Verify Spec Artifact Consistency
description: WHY: Renaming analyze to verify aligns with OpenSpec conventions. Moving audit to skill reflects that codebase reconnaissance is passive context.
design: Rename analyze AI command to verify. Create sl-audit skill for codebase reconnaissance. Update help text to note verify replaces analyze.

title: Phase: US4 - Update Skills with Progressive Loading
description: WHY: Improves developer experience by making skills additive. Progressive loading ensures skills don't bloat agent context.
design: Update sl-issue-tracking and sl-deps skills to reference CLI. Create sl-comment skill following same pattern. Skills trigger on CLI references.

title: Phase: US8 - Template Lifecycle via sl doctor --template
description: WHY: Keeps projects up-to-date with workflow improvements, but less urgent than core workflow commands.
design: Add --template flag to sl doctor. Update built-in skills/commands to latest embedded versions. Preserve custom files. Detect stale commands.

title: Phase: US12 - Context Detection Fallback Chain
description: WHY: Current ContextDetector is single regex. Non-conforming branches fail with hard error, forcing --spec flags everywhere.
design: Implement 4-step fallback: regex match → yaml alias → git heuristic → interactive prompt. Store aliases in specledger.yaml.

title: Phase: US13 - Phase Out Bash Scripts
description: WHY: Cross-platform support is a constraint. Bash scripts break this and create two codepaths for same operation.
design: Update AI command templates to call sl CLI instead of bash scripts. Verify all commands work on macOS, Linux, Windows without bash.

title: Phase: US14 - Clarify Absorbs Revise Comment Handling
description: WHY: Two separate comment-handling workflows creates confusion. Consolidating AI reasoning into clarify while keeping sl revise as CLI launcher creates clean separation.
design: Update /specledger.clarify to detect open comments via sl comment list. Agent uses sl comment reply and sl comment resolve. Remove /specledger.revise template.

title: Phase: US9 - Update CLI README
description: WHY: Documentation is essential for adoption. Users discovering SpecLedger need accurate, up-to-date information.
design: Update README.md to document all streamlined commands with usage examples. Ensure quickstart instructions match actual CLI behavior.

title: Phase: US5 - Document Consolidated Workflow
description: WHY: Documentation is important but follows the actual consolidation work.
design: Update documentation for consolidated workflow. Document all skills, commands, and CLI commands with purposes. Ensure workflow is clear and unambiguous.

title: Phase: US10 - Add CHANGELOG for Templates
description: WHY: Provides transparency for template evolution but is not critical to core workflow experience.
design: Add CHANGELOG.md to embedded templates. List all AI command and skill files with versions. Track changes with version references.

title: Phase: Polish - Cross-Cutting Concerns
description: WHY: Improvements that affect multiple user stories and final cleanup.
design: Documentation updates, code cleanup, performance optimization, security hardening, quickstart validation.

title: Phase: US15 - Session Lifecycle Hooks
description: WHY: P3 because manual checkpoint invocation works. Lifecycle hooks are reliability improvement for ensuring no session ends without captured progress.
design: Add SessionEnd hook for checkpoint trigger. Add stale data warning. Document future hooks: PreContextCompaction, PostSessionCapture.

title: [Setup] Create pkg/cli/comment/ package structure
description: WHY: Establish package structure for comment CRUD extraction from revise package.
design: Create pkg/cli/comment/ directory. Add types.go with ReviewComment, CommentThread, CommentSummary, CommentDetail, CommentListOutput, CommentShowOutput types per data-model.md.
acceptance_criteria: pkg/cli/comment/ directory exists with types.go containing all required structs matching data-model.md definitions.

title: [Setup] Create pkg/cli/spec/ package structure
description: WHY: Establish package structure for sl spec CLI commands that replace bash scripts.
design: Create pkg/cli/spec/ directory. Add types.go with FeatureInfo, FeatureCreateResult, PlanSetupResult, BranchNameConfig types per data-model.md.
acceptance_criteria: pkg/cli/spec/ directory exists with types.go containing all required structs matching data-model.md definitions.

title: [Setup] Create pkg/cli/context/ package structure
description: WHY: Establish package structure for sl context update command that replaces update-agent-context.sh.
design: Create pkg/cli/context/ directory. Add types.go with PlanMetadata, AgentFileMapping, UpdateResult types per data-model.md.
acceptance_criteria: pkg/cli/context/ directory exists with types.go containing all required structs matching data-model.md definitions.

title: [Foundational] Extract PostgREST client from revise to comment package
description: WHY: The 4-step query chain (project→spec→change→comments) is reusable. Comment CRUD should not depend on revise package.

items.item: pkg/cli/revise updated to import from comment
sl revise still works after refactor

design: Move PostgREST client logic from pkg/cli/revise/client.go to pkg/cli/comment/client.go. Keep auth retry, token refresh, query patterns. Update revise to import from comment package.
acceptance_criteria: pkg/cli/comment/client.go contains Client struct with GetProject, GetSpec, GetChange, ListComments, ListReplies, BuildThreads, ResolveComment methods. pkg/cli/revise imports from comment package.

title: [Foundational] Port common.sh utilities to Go
description: WHY: Common utilities (repo root detection, branch detection, feature paths) are needed by all new CLI commands.
design: Port common.sh logic into internal Go packages. Reuse existing ContextDetector from internal/ref/. Add feature path resolution functions.
acceptance_criteria: Go functions exist for repo root detection, current branch detection, feature dir resolution. No bash dependency for these operations.

title: [Foundational] Add remote branch collision check
description: WHY: Address issue #46 - prevent numeric prefix collisions by checking remote branches.

items.item: Collision detection across local and remote

design: Extend branch_name.go to check remote branches via go-git. Fetch remote refs and check for existing numeric prefixes before generating new number.
acceptance_criteria: Branch number generation checks both local specledger/*/ dirs AND remote git branches. Collision prevented across local and remote.

title: [Foundational] Add CreateReply method to comment client
description: WHY: sl comment reply command needs to POST replies to PostgREST.
design: Add CreateReply(changeID, input CommentReplyInput) error method to Client in pkg/cli/comment/client.go. POST to /rest/v1/review_comments with parent_comment_id set.
acceptance_criteria: CreateReply method exists and posts reply to PostgREST. Reply linked to parent comment via parent_comment_id field.

title: [Foundational] Implement branch name generation with stop words
description: WHY: sl spec create needs deterministic branch name generation with collision prevention.
design: Create pkg/cli/spec/branch_name.go. Implement stop word filtering (41 words), acronym detection, GitHub 244-byte limit. Check local specledger/*/ dirs for collision.
acceptance_criteria: Branch name generator filters stop words, preserves acronyms, enforces 244-byte limit, checks for local collisions.

title: [US11] Implement sl comment list subcommand
description: WHY: Agents need to scan open comments with compact output to identify which ones to process.
design: Create list subcommand in pkg/cli/commands/comment.go. Output compact table (human) or CommentListOutput JSON. Support --status, --spec, --json flags. Truncate previews per contract.
acceptance_criteria: sl comment list displays compact overview with truncated previews, reply counts, and follow-up hint. --json outputs valid CommentListOutput.

title: [US11] Implement sl comment show subcommand
description: WHY: Agents need full comment details with thread context after identifying comments from list.
design: Create show subcommand in pkg/cli/commands/comment.go. Accept multiple IDs. Output full CommentDetail with complete content and all replies. Support --json flag.
acceptance_criteria: sl comment show displays full comment with complete thread replies. Accepts multiple IDs for batch fetch. --json outputs valid CommentShowOutput.

title: [US11] Implement sl comment reply subcommand
description: WHY: Agents need to post detailed replies to comments before resolving them.

items.item: Reply linked to parent via parent_comment_id

design: Create reply subcommand in pkg/cli/commands/comment.go. Use --content flag for reply text. Call CreateReply on client. Use authenticated user name/email.
acceptance_criteria: sl comment reply posts reply linked to parent comment. Reply visible in show output.

title: [US11] Implement sl comment resolve subcommand
description: WHY: Agents need to mark comments resolved after addressing them, with optional reason.

items.item: Reason posted as reply before resolve

design: Create resolve subcommand in pkg/cli/commands/comment.go. Support --reason flag (posts reply first). Cascade resolve all replies. PATCH is_resolved=true.
acceptance_criteria: sl comment resolve marks comment resolved. Optional --reason posted as reply first. All replies also resolved.

title: [US11] Wire sl comment command into main CLI
description: WHY: Make sl comment available as top-level CLI command.
design: Add comment command to cmd/sl/main.go. Register list, show, reply, resolve subcommands.
acceptance_criteria: sl comment --help shows available subcommands. All subcommands accessible.

title: [US16] Implement sl spec info command
description: WHY: Replace check-prerequisites.sh with Go CLI for cross-platform support.
design: Create pkg/cli/spec/info.go with Info() function. Create info subcommand in pkg/cli/commands/spec.go. Support --json, --paths-only, --require-plan, --require-tasks, --include-tasks flags. Output must match bash script JSON exactly.
acceptance_criteria: sl spec info outputs JSON with FEATURE_DIR, AVAILABLE_DOCS matching check-prerequisites.sh. All flags work as specified.

title: [US16] Implement sl spec create command
description: WHY: Replace create-new-feature.sh with Go CLI for cross-platform support.
design: Create pkg/cli/spec/create.go with Create() function. Create create subcommand in pkg/cli/commands/spec.go. Support --json, --number, --short-name flags. Create git branch, spec dir, copy template.
acceptance_criteria: sl spec create creates branch, specledger/ dir, spec.md from template. JSON output matches bash script. Branch number collision prevented.

title: [US16] Implement sl spec setup-plan command
description: WHY: Replace setup-plan.sh with Go CLI for cross-platform support.
design: Create pkg/cli/spec/plan_setup.go with SetupPlan() function. Create setup-plan subcommand in pkg/cli/commands/spec.go. Copy plan template to feature dir. Output JSON paths.
acceptance_criteria: sl spec setup-plan copies plan template to feature dir. JSON output matches setup-plan.sh.

title: [US16] Implement sl context update command
description: WHY: Replace update-agent-context.sh with Go CLI for cross-platform support.
design: Create pkg/cli/context/update.go and mappings.go. Create update subcommand in pkg/cli/commands/context.go. Parse plan.md, update agent files, preserve manual additions. Support 17+ agent types. Avoid bash script anti-patterns from R9.
acceptance_criteria: sl context update parses plan.md and updates agent files. Manual additions preserved. Active Technologies deduplicated. Recent Changes bounded to 3 entries.

title: [US16] Wire sl spec and sl context commands into main CLI
description: WHY: Make sl spec and sl context available as top-level CLI commands.
design: Add spec and context commands to cmd/sl/main.go. Register all subcommands.
acceptance_criteria: sl spec --help and sl context --help show available subcommands. All subcommands accessible.

title: [US1] Audit and document workflow component inventory
description: WHY: Cannot streamline without understanding current state. Need complete inventory organized by layer.
design: Audit all skills in pkg/embedded/skills/, all commands in .opencode/commands/, all CLI commands in pkg/cli/commands/. Document layer assignments (Hook/CLI/Command/Skill) and pattern classifications.
acceptance_criteria: Complete inventory of all components with layer assignment and pattern classification. Document overlaps with rationale.

title: [US1] Draft CLI development constitution
description: WHY: Establish framework for all consolidation decisions. Define 5 established patterns with review gates.

items.item: Added to AGENTS.md or separate doc

design: Document 5 patterns: Data CRUD, Launcher, Hook trigger, Environment, Template mgmt. Define constraints: offline capability, cross-platform, layer boundaries. Add to AGENTS.md or separate doc.
acceptance_criteria: CLI constitution document defines all 5 patterns with examples. Review gates and constraints clearly stated.

title: [US6] Create spike AI command template
description: WHY: Spikes are essential for reducing implementation risk by validating approaches early.
design: Create .opencode/commands/specledger.spike.md. Template creates research file at specledger/[spec]/research/yyyy-mm-dd-[name].md. Include objective, investigation plan, findings, recommendation sections.
acceptance_criteria: Spike command creates research file with date prefix. File follows spike template structure.

title: [US7] Create checkpoint AI command template
description: WHY: Checkpoints provide safety and visibility into implementation progress.
design: Create .opencode/commands/specledger.checkpoint.md. Template creates session file at specledger/[spec]/sessions/yyyy-mm-dd-[name].md. Include spec compliance, changed files, deviations, session log sections.
acceptance_criteria: Checkpoint command creates session file with date prefix. File includes spec compliance, git changes, session log.

title: [US4] Create sl-comment skill
description: WHY: Skills teach agents when/how to use CLI tools. sl-comment skill needed for progressive loading.
design: Create pkg/embedded/skills/sl-comment.md following sl-issue-tracking pattern. Include: when to use, CLI reference for list/show/reply/resolve, JSON parsing tips.
acceptance_criteria: sl-comment skill exists and teaches agent sl comment usage patterns. Triggered by comment references in AI commands.

title: [US14] Update clarify command to use sl comment CLI
description: WHY: Clarify absorbs revise's comment-processing intelligence. Replace sl revise --summary with sl comment list.
design: Update .opencode/commands/specledger.clarify.md. Replace sl revise --summary with sl comment list --status open --json. Add sl comment reply and sl comment resolve instructions.
acceptance_criteria: Clarify command detects open comments via sl comment list. Agent uses sl comment reply and sl comment resolve for each comment.

title: [US14] Remove /specledger.revise AI command template
description: WHY: Revise AI command absorbed by clarify. CLI launcher sl revise stays, but AI command template removed.
design: Remove .opencode/commands/specledger.revise.md. Will be detected as stale by sl doctor --template per D3.
acceptance_criteria: revise.md template removed. sl revise CLI still works as launcher.

title: [US4] Update sl-issue-tracking and sl-deps skills
description: WHY: Skills must complement CLI functionality, not duplicate it.
design: Update existing skills to reference CLI commands rather than duplicating logic. Ensure progressive loading pattern.
acceptance_criteria: Skills reference CLI commands. No duplication of CLI logic. Progressive loading documented.

title: [US12] Implement ContextDetector fallback chain step 2: yaml alias
description: WHY: Non-conforming branches need resolution via yaml alias lookup.
design: Add yaml alias lookup to ContextDetector. Read branch_aliases from specledger.yaml. Map branch name to spec slug.
acceptance_criteria: ContextDetector resolves branch via yaml alias lookup. Alias saved to specledger.yaml after interactive prompt.

title: [US12] Implement ContextDetector fallback chain step 3: git heuristic
description: WHY: Non-conforming branches without alias need resolution via git diff analysis.
design: Add git heuristic to ContextDetector. Diff branch against base, find specledger/ directories modified. If exactly one, use that spec.
acceptance_criteria: ContextDetector resolves branch via git diff analysis. Works for branches with commits touching single spec directory.

title: [US8] Add --template flag to sl doctor
description: WHY: Template management is repo health, part of sl doctor. Add --template flag for updating skills/commands.
design: Add --template flag to sl doctor command. Update built-in skills/commands to latest embedded versions. Preserve custom files by filename matching.
acceptance_criteria: sl doctor --template updates built-in files. Custom files preserved. --dry-run shows pending changes.

title: [US8] Implement stale command detection
description: WHY: Detect stale specledger. prefixed commands no longer in playbook.
design: Compare installed commands against embedded template list. Flag commands not in current playbook. Prompt for removal with option to keep.
acceptance_criteria: Stale commands detected and flagged. User prompted for removal. Non-standard prefixes treated as user-owned.

title: [US3] Rename analyze to verify AI command
description: WHY: Align with OpenSpec terminology. Verify checks spec artifacts for consistency.
design: Rename .opencode/commands/specledger.analyze.md to specledger.verify.md. Update help text to note it replaces analyze.
acceptance_criteria: Verify command exists. Help text notes it replaces analyze for SpecKit users.

title: [US3] Create sl-audit skill
description: WHY: Codebase reconnaissance is passive context injection, not AI workflow orchestration.
design: Create pkg/embedded/skills/sl-audit.md. Provide codebase context: tech stack, modules, dependency graphs. Progressive loading triggered by audit references.
acceptance_criteria: sl-audit skill exists and provides codebase reconnaissance context. Complementary to /simplify.

title: [US2] Add sl deps graph subcommand
description: WHY: Consolidate dependency visualization into sl deps CLI.
design: Add graph subcommand to sl deps. Absorb sl graph functionality. Output dependency graph for specs.
acceptance_criteria: sl deps graph provides dependency visualization. sl graph absorbed into deps.

title: [US13] Update AI command templates to call sl CLI
description: WHY: AI commands currently call bash scripts. Update to call sl CLI commands instead.
design: Update .opencode/commands/ templates. Replace check-prerequisites.sh with sl spec info, create-new-feature.sh with sl spec create, setup-plan.sh with sl spec setup-plan, update-agent-context.sh with sl context update.
acceptance_criteria: All AI command templates call sl CLI instead of bash scripts. Commands work on macOS, Linux, Windows.

title: [US9] Update README.md with streamlined commands
description: WHY: Documentation essential for adoption. Users need accurate CLI information.
design: Update README.md to document all streamlined commands. Add usage examples for sl comment, sl spec, sl context. Ensure quickstart instructions match CLI behavior.
acceptance_criteria: README documents all commands with examples. Quickstart instructions accurate.

title: [US5] Update workflow documentation
description: WHY: Documentation important but follows consolidation work.
design: Update documentation for consolidated workflow. Document all skills, commands, CLI commands with purposes. Ensure workflow clear and unambiguous.
acceptance_criteria: Documentation updated for consolidated workflow. All components documented with purposes.

title: [US10] Add CHANGELOG.md to embedded templates
description: WHY: Provides transparency for template evolution.
design: Add CHANGELOG.md to embedded templates directory. List all AI command and skill files with versions. Track changes with version references.
acceptance_criteria: CHANGELOG.md exists in templates. Lists command/skill files with versions. Updated on changes.

title: [US15] Document session lifecycle hooks
description: WHY: Lifecycle hooks are reliability improvement for checkpoint capture.
design: Document future hooks: SessionEnd, PreContextCompaction, PostSessionCapture. Add hook documentation to AGENTS.md or separate doc.
acceptance_criteria: Future hooks documented. SessionEnd hook purpose clear.
